# Genesis Conductor MCP Servers

> Revenue-generating AI agent skills for DeFi, smart contracts, and Apple toolchain.
> Part of the Genesis Conductor ecosystem by Igor Holt.

## What are MCP Servers?
Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers that provide tools for AI agents to interact
with external systems. These servers enable AI agents to execute real-world actions.

## Available Servers
- DeFi integration tools
- Smart contract deployment
- Apple toolchain automation
- Revenue generation capabilities

## Integration
Compatible with:
- Claude Desktop
- ChatGPT (via Actions)
- Cursor IDE
- Gemini CLI
- Codex CLI
- Any MCP-compatible client

## Related Projects
- [Genesis Conductor](https://github.com/Genesis-Conductor-Engine/Genesis-Conductor): Main engine
- [Ambient Access Layer](https://optimization-inversion.genesisconductor.io): Live API
- [Kiro Powers](https://github.com/Genesis-Conductor-Engine/genesis-conductor-powers): Extensions

## Creator
Igor Holt — AI Architect
https://github.com/igor-holt
